title: Leverage Effect: WSE vs NYSE
text:
This project investigates the leverage effect in equity markets through a comparison of the Warsaw Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange.



The analysis is inspired by an academic article on volatility asymmetry and leverage effects in financial markets.

title: Actuarial Projects Portfolio
text:
I am building a portfolio of projects related to actuarial science, quantitative methods, and computational modelling. The repository combines academic work with coding-based investigations, including simulation, statistical analysis, and financial modelling.




Comparative analysis of volatility asymmetry in the Polish and U.S. equity markets, motivated by academic literature and supported by empirical market data.





actuarial and quantitative finance projects
statistical modelling and data analysis
computational methods, including simulation
reproducible code and project summaries




You can browse the full codebase on GitHub alongside the project pages presented here.
